summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of LiftAi premium landing page. All 11 sections implemented correctly with proper data-testids, animations, and responsive design. Dark theme, serif fonts, and Apple-style design successfully implemented.

design_issues.issue: One image (Image 10) failed to load in iPhone mockup components

passed_tests: Serif heading font (Cormorant Garamond) loaded and applied
Navbar with LiftAi logo and Download button functional
Hero section with correct headline and clickable buttons
Social proof section with working count-up animation (790+, 25, 20+, 12-week)
Sticky scroll section with 5 progress dots and frame transitions
All 7 feature showcase sections present with correct data-testids
Final CTA section with proper headline and clickable button
14 iPhone mockup components found and rendered
Mobile responsiveness - desktop sticky hidden, mobile version shown
All buttons clickable on both desktop and mobile
Reveal animations working when scrolling to sections
Hover effects working on buttons and iPhone mockups
Color scheme matches specifications (primary: #F0EDE8, secondary: #9B9B9B, accent: #A3BCA7)
12 out of 13 iPhone screen images loading successfully
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor: Check and fix the one failing iPhone mockup image (Image 10) loading issue. All other functionality working perfectly.
